channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Microsoft unveils its next-generation Arm-based CPU - Cobalt 200 looks to unlock even more Azure power
item.description: Microsoft Cobalt 200 looks to improve cloud performance through custom silicon, efficiency features, and workload-specific design across expanding Azure infrastructure.
item.dc:creator: Efosa Udinmwen, TechRadar

item.title: France vs Australia free streams: How to watch Autumn International 2025, TV Channels, Preview & Team News
item.description: All the ways to watch France vs Australia live streams online, as Les Bleus host the Wallabies at Stade de France for their 2025 Autumn International closer.
item.dc:creator: Jacob Jones, TechRadar

item.title: Wales vs New Zealand free streams: How to watch Autumn International 2025, TV Channels, Preview & Team News
item.description: All the ways to watch Wales vs New Zealand live streams online, with the All Blacks looking to end their 2025 Autumn International campaign on a high in Cardiff.
item.dc:creator: Aatif Sulleyman, TechRadar

item.title: I loved Google’s new Gemini AI—except when it gaslit me
item.description: Hi again, and welcome back to Fast Company’s Plugged In. On November 18, Google announced a new product. More precisely, it declared that it was ushering in “a new era”—which is what tech companies do when they really want you to pay attention.
item.dc:creator: Harry McCracken, Fast Company

item.title: X was down again– here's how its latest outage played out
item.description: X suffered a major blip again this week, with thousands reporting that the social media site was down in the both the US and UK –but it seems to have recovered.
item.dc:creator: Mark Wilson, TechRadar

item.title: France will investigate Musk’s Grok chatbot after Holocaust denial claims
item.description: France's government is taking action against Elon Musk's AI chatbot, Grok, after it generated posts questioning the use of gas chambers at Auschwitz.
item.dc:creator: Thomas Adamson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Jealous of Asus ROG Xbox Ally owners due to them having the 'Full Screen Experience'? It's now coming to all Windows 11 handhelds
item.description: Microsoft's 'Full Screen Experience' is now coming to all handhelds and that's good news for Windows 11 portables.
item.dc:creator: Darren Allan, TechRadar

item.title: Nestlé manages business processes with SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
item.description: With approximately 280,000 employees and sales of 91.4 billion Swiss francs (2024), Nestlé is one of the world’s largest food and beverage manufacturers. Well-known brands of the group include Maggi, the KitKat chocolate bar, and coffee specialties such as Nespresso and Nescafé.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: A drying-up Rio Grande basin threatens water security on both sides of the border
item.description: Researchers have completed a full accounting of water uses and losses in the Rio Grande-Bravo basin as it faces severe shortages throughout its range in the United States and Mexico.
item.dc:creator: Susan Montoya Bryan, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: The what, why and how of agentic AI for supply chain management
item.description: Efficient supply chain management (SCM) requires contending with vast amounts of data, constantly changing variables and multiple stakeholders; factors that have traditionally made SCM difficult for humans, to put it mildly.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Gemini 3 may be the moment Google pulls away in the AI arms race
item.description: Google announced its widely anticipated Gemini 3 model Tuesday. By many key metrics, it appears to be more capable than the other big generative AI models on the market.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: U.S. Cyber Command has a new Chief Artificial Intelligence Officer
item.description: Novotny steps into the role amid leadership turnover and other turmoil at the military’s top cyber enterprise. The post U.S. Cyber Command has a new Chief Artificial Intelligence Officer first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Michele Sandiford, Federal News Network

item.title: NASA unveils close-up pictures of the comet popping by from another star
item.description: NASA is unveiling close-up pictures of the interstellar comet that's making a quick one-and-done tour of our solar system.
item.dc:creator: Marcia Dunn, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Gartner: IT spending in Europe to increase 11% in 2026
item.description: US research firm Gartner predicts that IT spending in Europe will increase by 11% to a total of $1.4 trillion in 2026. Growth is expected to be driven by AI, cloud computing and cybersecurity, despite limited IT budgets and few new hires.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Microsoft Fabric IQ adds ‘semantic intelligence’ layer to Fabric
item.description: With Fabric IQ, Microsoft is adding new semantic intelligence capabilities to its unified data and analytics platform, Fabric, that it says will help enterprises maintain a common data model and automate operational decisions.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Google releases Gemini 3 with new reasoning and automation features
item.description: Google has launched Gemini 3 and integrated the new AI model into its search engine immediately, aiming to push advanced AI features into consumer and enterprise products faster as competition in the AI market intensifies.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Building a scalable document management system: Lessons from separating metadata and content
item.description: When I was tasked with modernizing our enterprise document management system, I knew the stakes were high. We were managing millions of documents, and our legacy architecture was buckling under the load.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Clojure for Java developers: What you need to know
item.description: Clojure is one of the most fascinating branches of the programming family tree. It unites the high-design heritage of Lisp with practical, modern capabilities. For Java developers, Clojure can be an excellent expansion of their worldview.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Singapore makes the leap to Wi-Fi 7 to boost fan experience
item.description: Recently, Cisco held the Asia-Pacific version of its Cisco Live user event. While this event is typically used to announce new Cisco products, the news payload this year included an interesting customer use case.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Dell targets enterprise AI with switches, servers, reinforced Nvidia partnership
item.description: Dell Technologies has filled out its enterprise AI infrastructure products with key upgrades to servers, storage, and software offerings. First, announced at the Supercomputing 25 conference, the company introduced two new switches, the Dell PowerSwitch Z9964F-ON and Dell PowerSwitch Z9964FL-ON.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: DLA’s Tech Accelerator Team showing how to spur innovation
item.description: David Koch, the director of research and development at the Defense Logistics Agency, said the Tech Accelerator Team is helping DLA solve problems differently. The post DLA’s Tech Accelerator Team showing how to spur innovation first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: IBM readies commercially valuable quantum technology
item.description: Many companies — including IBM — this year demonstrated uses of quantum computers that went beyond what was possible with purely classical approaches.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Adaptive Power in iOS 26 boosts iPhone battery life
item.description: Discover how iOS 26's new Adaptive Power feature automatically extends iPhone battery life by learning your usage patterns and adjusting performance intelligently.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
